assets.purpose: Let any finance/real estate blog embed a working mortgage affordability calculator. Each embed includes a 'Powered by QFINHUB' link creating natural backlinks.
assets.target_backlinks: Real estate agents, mortgage brokers, personal finance bloggers, first-time homebuyer guides
assets.required_data: Existing mortgage affordability calculator logic, responsive CSS for iframe
required_components: iframe-compatible calculator with embed code generator
Configurable default values (state, loan amount, rate)
build_steps: Extract affordability calculator into standalone component
assets.expected_seo_value: High — one placement on DR50+ blog generates significant domain authority

assets.purpose: Original research page with state-by-state affordability data. Journalists cite original data — each citation is a potential backlink.
assets.target_backlinks: CNET Money, NerdWallet, The Balance, MarketWatch, local news real estate sections
assets.required_data: Census median income data, Zillow median home price data, current mortgage rates (6.5%), property tax rates by state
build_steps: Calculate affordability by state using 28% rule
assets.expected_seo_value: High — data studies are the #1 linkable asset type. A single MarketWatch citation can generate 50+ backlinks.

assets.purpose: Interactive chart demonstrating the power of starting early — $100/month from age 25 vs 35 vs 45. Highly shareable, education-focused.
assets.target_backlinks: Financial literacy educators, high school economics teachers, FIRE community, personal finance YouTubers
assets.required_data: Compound interest formula, historical S&P returns data
required_components: Customizable inputs (monthly contribution, rate, retirement age)
build_steps: Design chart UX with 3 stacked scenarios
Create educational context around the visualization
assets.expected_seo_value: Medium-High — educational resources get .edu links and long-term passive backlinks.
